overall.description: Spider-Man perched on a building ledge overlooking Times Square at sunset, observing traffic and illuminated billboards below. The scene is rendered in a high-quality game engine with warm golden hour lighting mixing with vibrant artificial billboard illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: Times Square intersection with digital billboards and advertising screens

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crouches on a building ledge overlooking the street, occasionally shifting position and scanning the area below

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving down the multi-lane street below

entered.detail: Large vertical advertisement featuring a woman with BUMPY SAINTS text
Red advertisement billboard with white COLEXCO branding
Large red vertical billboard displaying INTENSE PERSONAL with product bottle image
Tall vertical screen showing a woman in a blue dress
Tall building covered in multiple layers of digital screens and advertisements

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man observes Times Square from a high building ledge during golden hour. The scene features massive illuminated billboards including the red INTENSE PERSONAL advertisement and BUMPY SAINTS display, while traffic flows through the multi-lane street below. The warm sunset light mixes with the artificial glow of the digital screens.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady perspective from a high building ledge that emphasizes the contrast between the natural sunset and the artificial brilliance of Times Square. It begins with Spider-Man perched overlooking the city, where the warm golden hour light blends with the vibrant glow of the urban landscape. As the camera lingers, the focus shifts toward the massive illuminated billboards, specifically highlighting the red INTENSE PERSONAL advertisement and the BUMPY SAINTS display. The scene then expands to encompass the multi-lane street below, where the flow of traffic pulses beneath the mixing light of the setting sun and the digital screens.
